name: model-quality-test
description: Multi-provider model quality and channel probe with Vercel APIs, PostgreSQL logs, TOTP auth, and cost estimates.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check questions.js && find api -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.test:db: node tests/db-smoke.js && node tests/auth-smoke.js && node tests/run-test-smoke.js
